caption: A young woman and a young man are positioned close together, focused on something out of view to the right. The woman, wearing a green tank top with white trim and purple-tinted sunglasses resting on her head, has earphones in her ears. Beside her, the man wears a white cap and a dark jacket over a white t-shirt. They are in an indoor setting with a light-colored wall and visible structural beams in the background. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains relatively still, looking intently ahead with a neutral expression. The man is seen speaking, his mouth opening and closing as he interacts with her or the object they are observing. The camera remains steady, capturing a tight medium shot of the pair, with the lighting remaining consistent across the scene.
